title: Subject matter and scope
text: CSRD introduces mandatory sustainability reporting requirements for large companies and listed SMEs operating in the EU.

title: Double materiality assessment
text: Undertakings shall conduct a double materiality assessment covering impact materiality and financial materiality.

title: Supply chain due diligence
text: Undertakings shall report due diligence processes, value-chain risks, and actions to prevent or mitigate adverse impacts.

title: Climate change disclosures
text: ESRS E1 requires reporting on climate targets, transition planning, and greenhouse gas emissions including scope 1, 2, and 3.

title: Products promoting ESG characteristics
text: Article 8 products promote environmental or social characteristics and must meet specific disclosure requirements.

title: Criteria for environmentally sustainable activity
text: Activities must substantially contribute, do no significant harm, and meet minimum safeguards to be taxonomy-aligned.
